form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 295m at this track beaten 2 lengths (17.49) behind Goodwyn in a Class 1 on April 10. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Vida Vikkers at this track last start over 295m (17.25). Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Returned from a three months spell after being tipped out and finished seventh (17.82) over 295m at this track. Well have gained improvement from last start run but may still need another run. This looks too tough.
